collision energy: the normalized collision energy for elevated energy collision-driven dissociation (HCD) was adjusted to 28
fragmentation method: the normalized collision energy for elevated energy collision-driven dissociation (HCD) was adjusted to 28
instrument: the EASY-nanoLC 1200 system (Thermo Scientific), equipped with an Orbitrap Q Exactive HFX mass spectrometer
ionization type: via a nanospray ion source, was employed for LC-MS/MS analysis
labeling: we assessed semen volume, sperm content, and motility, and this process was replicated for all routine examinations.
